ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a biographical sketch, see N. De Blasi, `Benamati, Guidobaldo`, in DBI. Benamati was also member of the Disinvolti in Pesaro, and founder of the Addormentati in Gubbio. See Luca Tosin, `"Li stampatori sono buggiardi al paro de` sartori". Ovvero: il rapporto tra scrittori e tipografi del XVII secolo`, in Seicento e Settecento, 5 (2010), pp. 57-72.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
